site.lost: Workload physically at {{site}} with no stretched DR target — lost: {{n}} VMs · {{cpu}} · {{ram}}

applyPlanned.label: Apply planned ratios to this scenario
applyPlanned.on: This DR result uses the planned lens ratios, not the measured ratios.
applyPlanned.off: This DR result uses the measured allocation.

assumptions.title: What this models
assumptions.models: Models: physical CPU and RAM subtraction for the failed hosts or site; respects the active accounting mode and the chosen allocation ratios.
assumptions.doesNotModel: Does not model: HA admission control, anti-affinity rules, VM restart priority, stretched-cluster split-brain.

caveats.label: Caveats
caveats.reservationHigh: A surviving cluster's stretched reservation exceeds 80% of its physical RAM.

empty.noSelection: Select hosts (Server loss) or a site (Site loss) to simulate.
empty.noStretched: Site loss needs at least one cluster you have declared stretched. None are declared in this snapshot.
